movie.actors: John Travolta, Nicolas Cage, Joan Allen, Alessandro Nivola
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 11 wins & 21 nominations.
movie.plot: In order to foil an extortion plot, an FBI agent undergoes a facial transplant surgery and assumes the identity and physical appearance of a terrorist, but the plan turns from bad to worse when the same terrorist impersonates the FBI agent.
movie.title: Face/Off
